## Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated for every new behavior (TDD)
- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make typecheck` passes
- [ ] `make security` passes
- [ ] `make pack-check` passes (if backend changed)
- [ ] Log file added to `.claude/logs/` (if Claude session)
- [ ] `PROGRESS.md` updated (if Claude session)
